google.name: Google LLC
google.service_address: Google LLC, Legal Investigations Support, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043
google.notes: Google may require separate requests per product. Location History and Maps Timeline are stored separately from My Activity. Some data may require court order rather than subpoena.

apple.name: Apple Inc.
apple.service_address: Apple Inc., Legal Process Team, One Apple Park Way, Cupertino, CA 95014
apple.notes: Apple requires court orders for content data. Device backups may contain additional data categories.

microsoft.name: Microsoft Corporation
microsoft.service_address: Microsoft Corporation, Legal and Corporate Affairs, One Microsoft Way, Redmond, WA 98052
microsoft.notes: Microsoft accepts legal process through their online portal.
